subject_tmpl: IDOT — Mannheim Rd Resurfacing: Coordination Request for {DATE}
body_tmpl: Good morning, {NAME}. The Illinois Department of Transportation is scheduling mill-and-overlay work on Mannheim Road between {STREET} and {CROSS}, tentatively starting {DATE}. We'll need Bellwood to confirm utility conflicts and provide a traffic-management contact at least 30 days prior. Please acknowledge receipt and indicate your availability for a pre-construction call. Our project manager, {FIRST} {LAST}, can be reached at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the heads-up. I've pulled our GIS utility layers for that Mannheim corridor and see one water main conflict near {CROSS} worth discussing. I'm available the week of {DATE} for a pre-construction call — please circulate an invite. We'll also loop in Frank DiMeo from Public Works.

subject_tmpl: IDOT Signal Timing Update — Mannheim Rd at {STREET}
body_tmpl: This is a notice from IDOT District 1 Traffic Operations. We are adjusting signal timing at the Mannheim Road / {STREET} intersection effective {DATE} to improve throughput. A new cycle length of {NUM} seconds will be implemented. If Bellwood has concerns about pedestrian timing or local access impacts, please submit comments to our district office no later than {DATE}. Contact: {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Cook County Stormwater — Grant Application Support Needed
body_tmpl: Dear Mr. Reyes, Cook County Stormwater Management is accepting applications under the Community Flood Reduction Grant Program through {DATE}. Bellwood's {STREET} basin may qualify given documented flood events. We need a letter of support from the village and a 5-year capital plan excerpt to complete the submission. Can your office provide these by {DATE}? Feel free to call {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE} with questions.
reply_tmpl: We're interested in pursuing this grant. I'll draft the letter of support and pull the CIP excerpt for the {STREET} basin this week. Is there a specific scope or cost-share percentage we should reference in the letter?

subject_tmpl: Metra UP-W — Utility Permit for Station Access Ramp, {DATE}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} from Metra Engineering here. We're finalizing plans for an ADA access ramp at the Bellwood UP-W station that will cross village right-of-way on {STREET}. We need a utility encroachment permit from Bellwood before we can break ground on {DATE}. I've attached our permit package. Please let me know what additional documents your office requires and typical processing times.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for reaching out. Our standard encroachment permit takes {DAYS} business days once we have a complete package. I've reviewed your attachment — we'll also need an insurance certificate naming the Village and a traffic control plan. Rosa Marchetti can issue the permit once those are received.

subject_tmpl: Proviso Township — Co-Sponsorship Inquiry for Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Hello Kevin, Proviso Township is exploring a co-sponsorship arrangement for this year's Taste of Bellwood. We could contribute {AMOUNT} in sponsorship funds and supply {NUM} township volunteers on {DATE}. In exchange we'd like table space and logo placement in promotional materials. Can we set up a call before {DATE} to discuss details? Our events coordinator is {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Great news — we'd love to have Proviso Township as a sponsor. A {AMOUNT} contribution plus volunteers is very welcome. I'll send over our sponsorship packet with logo specs and booth layout options. Does the afternoon of {DATE} work for a quick call?

subject_tmpl: Bellwood Public Library — Special Event Permit for Author Series
body_tmpl: Good afternoon. The Bellwood Public Library is hosting a three-part author series beginning {DATE} in our community room at {ADDRESS}. Anticipated attendance is {NUM} per session. We want to confirm whether we need a special event permit from the village for public programming of this size, and if so what the fee schedule looks like. Please advise at your convenience.
reply_tmpl: Library programming of that size at your fixed address typically falls under your existing assembly occupancy — no separate village event permit is required. However, if you'll be serving food or alcohol, a temporary food handler notification is needed through our Health Officer. I'll email you that form.

subject_tmpl: Neighboring Village — Drainage Overflow onto Our ROW at {STREET}
body_tmpl: Frank, this is the Public Works Director from the neighboring village. We've had recurring drainage overflow from what appears to originate in Bellwood onto our right-of-way on the east side of {STREET} at {CROSS}. Photos were taken on {DATE} during a 1-inch rain event. We'd like to schedule a joint field visit before this causes pavement damage on our side. Is your schedule open the week of {DATE}?
reply_tmpl: I appreciate you reaching out directly. I reviewed our drainage maps and you may be right — there's a low point near {CROSS} that could be contributing. I'm available {DATE} for a field walk. I'll bring Tom Reyes, our engineer, as well.

subject_tmpl: Cook County Assessor — Records Request: {ADDRESS} Assessment Data
body_tmpl: Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act, the Cook County Assessor's Office requests copies of any village building permits, certificates of occupancy, and code violation records for the property at {ADDRESS} issued between {DATE} and {DATE}. This request is in support of our reassessment review. Please respond within the statutory timeframe. Reference: case {CASE}.

subject_tmpl: Outreach to IDOT re: {STREET} Crosswalk Safety Study
body_tmpl: Tom Reyes, PE, Bellwood Village Engineer, writing to IDOT District 1 regarding pedestrian safety at the Mannheim Road / {STREET} intersection. We've recorded {NUM} near-miss incidents since {DATE} and request IDOT conduct a formal crosswalk safety study. I've attached our incident log and a petition signed by {NUM} residents. Please advise on the study request process and expected timeline.

subject_tmpl: Metra Engineering — Right-of-Way Fence Permit at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Rosa, Metra needs to install a {NUM}-foot chain-link security fence along village-adjacent property at {ADDRESS} near the UP-W line. Our contractor is Verdi Excavating. I've attached our site plan and property survey. Please confirm the permit fee, any setback requirements, and whether a public notice is required before work begins {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Received your application. Fence permits on the rail corridor require a 5-foot village setback per our code. Fee is {AMOUNT}. No public notice is required for fencing. Once I verify the survey matches our GIS parcel, I can issue within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Cook County Public Health — Illegal Dump Site Report near {STREET}
body_tmpl: The Cook County Department of Public Health has received a complaint regarding an illegal dump site at approximately {ADDRESS} near {STREET}. Materials observed include construction debris and tires. Per our inter-governmental agreement, we are notifying you for coordinated cleanup. Our environmental inspector {FIRST} {LAST} ({PHONE}) is available to joint-inspect on {DATE}. Please confirm your availability.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the notification. I'll have my crew assess the volume before {DATE} and coordinate with your inspector. If it's over {NUM} cubic yards we'll need to engage a licensed hauler — I'll let you know after our initial look.

subject_tmpl: Letter to Proviso Township — Request for Joint Economic Development Meeting
body_tmpl: Dear Township Supervisor, Village Manager Karen Whitfield writing on behalf of Mayor Okonkwo. Bellwood is exploring a joint economic development initiative along the St. Charles Road corridor and believes Proviso Township's participation would strengthen grant applications and community outreach. We propose a meeting at Village Hall on {DATE} at {TIME}. Please RSVP by {DATE} so we can prepare an agenda. We look forward to partnering with you.

subject_tmpl: Cook County — Water Service Inquiry for County-Owned Parcel at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Hello, Cook County Facilities Management is reviewing utility costs for the county-owned parcel at {ADDRESS} in Bellwood. Our records show account {ACCT} but we have not received a bill since {DATE}. Can you confirm current service status, outstanding balance, and whether the account is in good standing? Please respond to {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: I looked up account {ACCT} for {ADDRESS}. Service is active; the last bill of {AMOUNT} was mailed {DATE} and shows unpaid. I'll email a duplicate statement. If you'd like to set up ACH payment for the county's accounts, I can send you that form as well.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — Vendor Coordination with Proviso Township Parks Dept
body_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, Kevin O'Brien from Bellwood Parks here. We're finalizing the vendor map for Taste of Bellwood on {DATE} and want to reserve {NUM} adjacent booth spaces for Township-affiliated vendors as discussed. Could you send me a confirmed vendor list by {DATE} so we can assign spots before the map goes to print? Also, will Township be providing their own tent, or should we include them in our rental order?

subject_tmpl: Verdi Excavating — Pre-Construction Notice, {STREET} Water Main Project
body_tmpl: Frank, Verdi Excavating here. We're scheduled to begin work on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {ADDRESS} on {DATE}. Our bore crew will be staging equipment at the corner of {STREET} and {CROSS} starting at {TIME}. We wanted to give your department advance notice and confirm there are no conflicts with village events or road closures that week. Contact our site super at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the heads-up. No village conflicts that week. Please ensure your traffic control meets MUTCD standards and that you notify 811 at least 72 hours before digging. Let me know if you need access to our utility maps.

subject_tmpl: Interdept: Vacant Lot Drainage Issue — {ADDRESS} Flagged in County Records
body_tmpl: Tom, Sandra Pulaski from Code Enforcement. I issued a notice to the property owner at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} for standing water and overgrowth. Cook County records show this parcel has a drainage easement that may be blocked. Can you take a look at our drainage layer to see if the easement is supposed to carry flow from the neighboring properties? I want to make sure any enforcement action is consistent with the easement conditions before we escalate.
reply_tmpl: I'll pull the easement file and overlay our drainage model today. The County recorded easement on that parcel runs {NUM} feet along the north property line — I'll verify whether it's obstructed and send you my findings by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: School District — Portable Classroom Permit Request, {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Good morning, Proviso Township High School District is requesting a permit to place {NUM} temporary portable classrooms at {ADDRESS} for the {DATE} school year while our permanent addition is under construction. The portables will be ADA-compliant and connected to existing utilities. Our facilities director {FIRST} {LAST} can provide plans. What is the permit fee and timeline for this type of temporary structure?
reply_tmpl: Temporary structure permits for school portables require a zoning variance waiver from the Village Manager and a building permit application with a site plan. Fee schedule: {AMOUNT} per unit. Typical review is {DAYS} business days. I'd recommend submitting no later than {DATE} to meet your school-year schedule.

subject_tmpl: Metra Ridership Concern — Pedestrian Safety on {STREET} near Station
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'm the president of the Bellwood Metra Riders Group. We have {NUM} members who commute daily from the UP-W station. The stretch of {STREET} between {CROSS} and the station platform has no street lighting and very poor pavement from {DATE}. Several riders have fallen at night. We've contacted Metra directly and they say lighting is a village responsibility. Can your office help us get this addressed before winter?
reply_tmpl: Thank you for bringing this to my attention. I've forwarded your message to Frank DiMeo in Public Works and Tom Reyes, our engineer, with a request to assess the {STREET} corridor near the station and propose a lighting solution. We'll follow up with you within {DAYS} business days.

subject_tmpl: Mutual Aid Request to Neighboring Village — Snow Equipment, {DATE}
body_tmpl: This is Frank DiMeo, Bellwood Public Works. We have a major snowfall event forecasted for {DATE} and our {NUM} plow trucks will be insufficient to handle all arterials and the Metra station access route. We're invoking our mutual aid agreement and requesting one tandem plow and operator for {DATE} through {DATE}. Please confirm availability and hourly rate. I can be reached at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Cook County Stormwater — Follow-Up on {STREET} Basin FEMA Application
body_tmpl: Good afternoon, Tom Reyes, PE, Village of Bellwood. I'm following up on our FEMA Hazard Mitigation Grant application (case {CASE}) submitted {DATE} for the {STREET} detention basin project. Our grant window closes {DATE} and we haven't yet received an acknowledgment from the County's pass-through office. Could you provide a status update? The project will benefit approximately {NUM} residential parcels in the flood zone.

subject_tmpl: Proviso Township — Joint Purchasing Agreement Renewal
body_tmpl: Yolanda, our Township Clerk's office is initiating renewal of the joint purchasing cooperative agreement with Bellwood ahead of the {DATE} expiration. The Township Board approved renewal on {DATE}. Please confirm that the Village Board has also authorized renewal and advise whether any amendments are needed. We'll need executed documents no later than {DATE}. Contact {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE} to coordinate.
reply_tmpl: The Village Board approved joint purchasing renewal at the {DATE} meeting. I'll prepare the signature pages for Mayor Okonkwo and get them back to you by {DATE}. Let me know if there are any new commodity categories the Township wants to add this cycle.

subject_tmpl: Thank You — Bellwood's Support During Mutual Aid Event, {DATE}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, on behalf of our municipality I want to formally thank Bellwood for the immediate mutual aid response our village received on {DATE}. Frank DiMeo's crew and your police liaison, Officer Banks, arrived within the hour and made a real difference during a difficult situation. This is what regional cooperation looks like. We hope to return the favor. Please pass our gratitude to your entire team.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for the kind words. Our team takes mutual aid commitments seriously, and I'm proud of how Frank, Officer Banks, and the rest of our staff responded. Bellwood is fortunate to have strong regional partners. Please don't hesitate to call on us again.

subject_tmpl: Notice to Cook County Building Dept — Concurrent Inspection Needed at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: This is Rosa Marchetti, Building Official for the Village of Bellwood. The property at {ADDRESS} falls in a shared jurisdiction zone where both Bellwood and Cook County have inspection authority. The developer has submitted for a {NUM}-unit residential permit (case {CASE}). I'd like to coordinate a joint inspection on {DATE} at {TIME} to avoid duplication. Please confirm whether County wants to participate or defer to village inspection for this project.

subject_tmpl: Bellwood Public Library — Request to Table at Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Hi Kevin, the Bellwood Public Library would love to have a table at this year's Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. We'd like to promote our summer reading program and distribute library cards. We're a non-profit village partner so we hope we qualify for a complimentary or reduced-rate space. We can bring {NUM} staff volunteers and our own canopy. Who should I contact to confirm a spot?
reply_tmpl: We always love having the Library at Taste of Bellwood! Village civic partners receive one complimentary 10x10 space. I'll reserve a spot near the {STREET} entrance for you. Please complete the vendor registration form I'll attach and return it by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: IDOT — Emergency Lane Closure, Mannheim Rd at {CROSS}, {DATE}
body_tmpl: IDOT District 1 is issuing emergency notification of a northbound lane closure on Mannheim Road at {CROSS} beginning {DATE} at {TIME} for emergency culvert repair. Anticipated duration is {DAYS} days. Detour will route through {STREET}. Please alert your PD watch commander and DPW. Contact our traffic management center at {PHONE} for real-time updates.
reply_tmpl: Received. I'm notifying Officer Banks and our PD Watch Commander now. I'll also have our crew check for any pavement issues on {STREET} before the detour traffic hits. Please copy me on any timeline changes.

subject_tmpl: Notice to Cook County — Delinquent Account on County Parcel, {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Lorena Diaz, Water Billing Clerk, Village of Bellwood. This is a formal notice that account {ACCT} for county-owned property at {ADDRESS} is {DAYS} days delinquent in the amount of {AMOUNT}. Per our inter-governmental billing agreement, we are required to notify the County before placing a lien. Please arrange payment or contact our office at {PHONE} within 30 days to avoid lien filing.

subject_tmpl: School District — Concern About Traffic at {STREET} During School Hours
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the principal of {NAME} School at {ADDRESS} has asked me to reach out about dangerous traffic conditions on {STREET} during student arrival and dismissal. We have had {NUM} near-miss incidents documented since {DATE}. We request the Village consider a crossing guard, additional signage, or a speed study. The school district is prepared to partner on solutions. Can we schedule a meeting with your Public Works Director?
reply_tmpl: Thank you for flagging this. Student safety is a top priority. I'll arrange a meeting with Frank DiMeo and Tom Reyes to review the {STREET} corridor near {ADDRESS}. My office will reach out within {DAYS} business days to schedule. We appreciate the District's willingness to partner.

subject_tmpl: Records Sharing Response to Cook County Sheriff — Case {CASE}
body_tmpl: Yolanda Pierce, Village Clerk, Village of Bellwood, responding to the Cook County Sheriff's records request (case {CASE}) received {DATE}. Pursuant to the inter-governmental records sharing agreement, I am transmitting the requested ordinance violations and permit records for {ADDRESS}. Please note that {NUM} pages are being withheld pending attorney review of potential personnel exemptions under 5 ILCS 140/7. We will provide a privilege log within 5 business days.

subject_tmpl: Referral to Cook County Health — Rodent Vector Complaint, {STREET}
body_tmpl: Priya Nair, Village Health Officer, writing to Cook County Department of Public Health. Bellwood has received {NUM} rodent complaints within a two-block radius of {STREET} and {CROSS} since {DATE}. Our authority is limited to private properties; the activity appears to originate from a County-owned vacant lot at {ADDRESS}. I am formally referring this for County vector control inspection and remediation. Please advise on your response timeline.

subject_tmpl: Neighboring Village — Mutual Aid Road Salt Request, Winter {DATE}
body_tmpl: Hi Frank, our Public Works Director here. We're running critically low on road salt after back-to-back storms this week. I know it's a lot to ask, but can Bellwood spare {NUM} tons from your stockpile? We can send a truck to your yard on {DATE} and replace the supply within {DAYS} days from our next delivery. We can reimburse at your cost. Please let me know quickly — our main arteries are at risk.
reply_tmpl: We can spare {NUM} tons without jeopardizing our own coverage. Send your truck to our yard at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} after {TIME}. I'll have my crew load you up. No rush on reimbursement — let's settle up at the end of the season.

subject_tmpl: Cook County — Inspection Access Request for County Bridge at {STREET}
body_tmpl: Rosa, Cook County Highway is scheduled to perform a biennial bridge inspection at the {STREET} overpass on {DATE} at {TIME}. Our inspection crew ({NUM} persons) and a snooper truck will need temporary lane closure in village right-of-way for approximately {DAYS} hours. This is routine maintenance under County jurisdiction but we wanted to formally notify the village and request any necessary access documentation.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the advance notice. For County-owned structures, no village permit is required for inspection access in our ROW, but we do ask for a traffic control plan 48 hours prior. Please also notify Officer Banks so PD can monitor the closure on {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Proviso Township — Request to Feature Bellwood in Township Newsletter
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, the Proviso Township Supervisor's office is compiling our {DATE} community newsletter and would like to feature a short piece on Bellwood's economic development initiatives along St. Charles Road. Could you or a designee provide a {NUM}-word write-up and a high-resolution photo by {DATE}? We'd also welcome a quote from you directly. This reaches approximately {NUM} township households.
reply_tmpl: What a great opportunity — thank you for including Bellwood. I'll have my office prepare a write-up on our St. Charles Road corridor work and send it along with a photo by {DATE}. Happy to provide a direct quote as well.

subject_tmpl: Cook County Land Bank — Inquiry on Vacant Property at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Good morning, the Cook County Land Bank Authority is reviewing {ADDRESS} as a candidate for our acquisition and rehab program. Before proceeding, we need to know whether there are any open municipal code violations, liens, or pending demolition orders against this property. Our acquisition window closes {DATE}. Could your office provide a violation history summary? Contact {FIRST} {LAST} at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: I pulled the file for {ADDRESS}. There are {NUM} open violations from {DATE} totaling {AMOUNT} in fines plus a {AMOUNT} administrative lien recorded {DATE}. No demolition order is pending. I can provide a certified violation history letter — fee is {AMOUNT}. Let me know if you'd like to proceed.

subject_tmpl: Request to Metra — Special Train Service for Taste of Bellwood, {DATE}
body_tmpl: Kevin O'Brien, Bellwood Parks Coordinator, writing to Metra Community Affairs. Taste of Bellwood draws approximately {NUM} visitors on the UP-W line and we'd like to explore added service or extended station hours on {DATE}. Last year several attendees missed the final inbound train. Can Metra accommodate one additional late-evening run from Bellwood station? I'm happy to provide attendance data to support the request.

subject_tmpl: Grant Application Submitted to Cook County — {STREET} Resurfacing Project
body_tmpl: Tom Reyes, PE, to Karen Whitfield and Mayor Okonkwo. I submitted our Surface Transportation Program application to Cook County DOT on {DATE} for the {STREET} resurfacing project from {CROSS} to {ADDRESS}. Total project cost is {AMOUNT}; we requested {AMOUNT} federal share and programmed the {AMOUNT} local match from our motor fuel tax fund. Anticipated award notification is {DATE}. I'll keep you posted on any requests for additional documentation.
